metadata.title: Web UI Foundation + LLM Models Page

story.iWant: a functional web UI foundation with sidebar navigation, empty states, API key management, and LLM models display
story.soThat: I can provide users with an intuitive interface to configure OpenRouter and view available models before implementing full project management features

phase.name: Phase 1: Foundation Setup
phase.task: Install shadcn components (sidebar-08, empty, table, input, select, card, checkbox)
Install Commit Mono font - self-hosted for Tauri app (verify fonts in apps/web/public/fonts/)
Update root layout with sidebar-08 (modify __root.tsx, create app-sidebar.tsx)
Create navigation configuration (lib/nav-config.ts with Home, Projects, Models, Settings)

phase.name: Phase 2: Home Page with Empty State
phase.task: Update home route (modify index.tsx with projects list query)
Create empty state component (projects/projects-empty.tsx using shadcn Empty)
Create projects list component placeholder

phase.name: Phase 3: Settings Page with API Keys
phase.task: Create settings route (routes/settings.tsx with session protection)
Create API key configuration UI (settings/api-keys-card.tsx)
API key state management (TanStack Query mutations for save/update/remove/test)
Backend API endpoints (packages/api/src/routers/settings.ts)
Encryption service (packages/api/src/services/encryption.ts with AES-256-GCM)

phase.name: Phase 4: LLM Models Page with Data Table
phase.task: Create models route (routes/models.tsx with session protection)
Create models data table columns (models/columns.tsx with sortable headers)
Create data table component (models/data-table.tsx with filtering/pagination)
Backend models endpoint (packages/api/src/routers/models.ts)
Models service layer - Provider Abstraction Pattern (packages/api/src/services/models.ts)

phase.name: Phase 5: Projects API Endpoint
phase.task: Extend projects router (add list procedure to packages/api/src/routers/projects.ts)

phase.name: Phase 6: Integration & Testing
phase.task: End-to-end flow testing (manual test all routes and features)
Component testing (unit tests for Empty, Sidebar, DataTable, API Keys Form)
Visual design validation (verify Commit Mono, shadcn components, CARBON theme)

group.name: Root Layout & Sidebar
group.criterion: Sidebar-08 block installed via bunx shadcn@latest add sidebar-08 and integrated into __root.tsx
Sidebar displays 4 navigation items with correct icons and labels (Home, Projects, LLM Models, Settings)
Sidebar collapses to icon-only mode when trigger button clicked
Active route highlighted with data-[active=true] state

group.name: Home Page Empty State
group.criterion: Empty component displays when projects.length === 0
"Create Project" button rendered and visible (primary button style)
FolderCode icon displayed in EmptyMedia component
Button click logs to console (placeholder - no actual project creation)

group.name: Settings Page API Configuration
group.criterion: Settings page displays API key input section for OpenRouter only
OpenRouter section has checkbox, password input, Show toggle, Test button, Update button, Remove button, Status badge
Save button stores encrypted API key in app_config.openrouterApiKey with correct userId
Status indicators update after test request (Valid ✅ / Invalid ❌ / Not Configured ⚪)
Encryption service uses AES-256 to encrypt keys before database storage

group.name: LLM Models Page Data Table
group.criterion: Models page fetches and displays models from OpenRouter only (when API key configured)
Search input filters models by name (client-side fuzzy matching)
Provider dropdown shows unique providers from fetched models
Min Context dropdown shows options: All, 8k, 32k, 128k, 200k+
Table columns sortable via header click (Model Name, Provider, Context Length, Price)
Pagination displays 25 models per page with Previous/Next buttons
Loading state shows skeleton table rows while fetching data
Error state shows Empty component with Retry button when API fails

group.name: Visual Design & Typography
group.criterion: Commit Mono font loaded from self-hosted files and applied to all body text
All components use shadcn-compatible CSS variables (--background, --foreground, --primary, etc.)
Dark mode enabled by default
Sidebar matches sidebar-08 block design pattern
Empty component matches shadcn Empty component design pattern

group.name: API Endpoints
group.criterion: trpc.projects.list returns user's projects filtered by userId
trpc.models.list returns models from OpenRouter when API key configured
trpc.settings.getApiKey returns masked OpenRouter API key (last 4 chars) and enabled status
trpc.settings.saveApiKey encrypts key and stores in app_config.openrouterApiKey
trpc.settings.updateApiKey allows updating existing API key (re-encrypts)
trpc.settings.removeApiKey deletes stored API key from app_config
trpc.settings.testApiKey validates OpenRouter API key via test request (with provider abstraction pattern for future extensibility)

group.name: Data Formatting
group.criterion: Context length formatted correctly (8000 → "8k", 128000 → "128k", 200000 → "200k", 1000000 → "1M")
Price formatted as "$input/$output" per 1M tokens
Provider names displayed as received from OpenRouter API response

group.name: Navigation & Routing
group.criterion: Clicking sidebar nav item navigates to correct route (all 4 routes verified)
Models and Settings routes require authentication (redirect to /login if no session)
Active route detection works correctly (highlights current page in sidebar)
Sidebar state (collapsed/expanded) persists across route changes

group.name: Error Handling
group.criterion: Models page shows error Empty component when OpenRouter API fetch fails
Settings page shows "Invalid" status when test API key fails
Protected routes redirect to login with appropriate error message
Data table shows "No results" empty state when filters return zero rows

group.name: Performance & UX
group.criterion: Models page loads within 2 seconds with 150 models from OpenRouter
Data table filtering/sorting responds within 100ms (client-side operations)
API key test completes within 3 seconds (shows loading spinner during test)
Sidebar navigation transitions are smooth (no layout shift or flicker)

group.name: Testing Coverage
group.criterion: Unit tests written for all new components (Empty, Sidebar, DataTable, API Keys Form)
Integration tests written for all new API endpoints (projects.list, models.list, settings.*)
Manual testing checklist completed

group.name: Component Installation
group.criterion: All shadcn components installed using bunx shadcn@latest add <component-name>
TanStack Table installed via bun add @tanstack/react-table

group.name: Extensibility Architecture
group.criterion: Models service implements provider abstraction pattern with ModelProvider interface
Adding new providers requires: Implement ModelProvider interface, Register in provider registry, Add UI fields (future story), No refactoring of existing core logic

doc.title: Chiron Product Requirements Document
doc.section: Functional Requirements - User Interface and Visualization
doc.snippet: FR016-FR020 define core UI requirements: Multi-Agent Dashboard, Story Kanban board, Artifact Workbench, Structured Exploration Lists, and Phase Navigation. FR035 specifies project list API endpoint requirement.

doc.title: Chiron Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: NFR003: Minimum 1280x720 responsive layout, shadcn/ui components, visual design matching UX foundation specification. Desktop-first approach with Tauri.

doc.title: Epic 1 Technical Specification
doc.section: Story 1.3 - Web UI Foundation + LLM Models Page
doc.snippet: Establishes React + TanStack Router web foundation with better-auth authentication. Delivers sidebar navigation (shadcn sidebar-08), home page with empty states, LLM models page (OpenRouter integration with TanStack Table), and Settings page with API key management using AES-256 encryption.

doc.title: Epic 1 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: React 19 + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui. TanStack Router for routing, TanStack Table for data tables, TanStack React Query for server state. Better-auth for authentication. OpenRouter for LLM API access.

doc.title: Chiron UX Design Specification
doc.section: Design System Foundation - shadcn/ui Component Registry
doc.snippet: Use shadcn/ui as component foundation with copy-paste philosophy. Components: Button, Dialog, Card, Tabs, Select, Input, Textarea, Dropdown, Tooltip, Popover. Install via bunx shadcn@latest add. Theming via CSS variables + Tailwind config for dark mode.

doc.title: Chiron UX Design Specification
doc.section: Core User Experience - Technical Typography & Monospace Aesthetic
doc.snippet: CARBON theme: Commit Mono font for all typography (self-hosted WOFF2 files), corner borders on cards/tables/buttons, dark mode default with sharp corners (border-radius: 0), monospace aesthetic for code-centric feel.

doc.title: Epic 1 - Database Implementation
doc.snippet: Transform home page to project list with empty state, add sidebar navigation using sidebar-08 block, implement LLM models page with OpenRouter API integration and TanStack Table, create Settings page with encrypted API key management. Use existing better-auth setup, connect to tRPC endpoints.

doc.title: Story 1.2 - Core Data Seeding (Completed)
doc.snippet: Database schema complete with 15 tables, seeded with 6 agents and 26 workflows. TanStack Router configured with root layout, better-auth client at lib/auth-client.ts, tRPC client at utils/trpc.ts. Projects router exists with create/get/delete endpoints. Dashboard route has session protection pattern.

artifact.reason: Root layout to be modified - Replace Header with SidebarProvider + AppSidebar + SidebarInset for sidebar-08 pattern integration
Home page to be transformed - Remove ASCII art, add projects.list query, conditional render for empty state vs projects list
Session protection pattern reference - Copy beforeLoad pattern for new models.tsx and settings.tsx routes requiring authentication
Current header component - Will be replaced by AppSidebar in root layout, may reuse user menu/theme toggle logic
Existing projects list endpoint - Already implemented, returns all projects ordered by createdAt DESC. Add userId filtering when multi-user support enabled.
API router registry - Add new models and settings routers here after creation
Self-hosted Commit Mono font files (4 variants) already present - Just add @font-face declarations to index.css
Global CSS file - Add Commit Mono @font-face declarations, verify shadcn CSS variables for CARBON theme (dark mode)
tRPC client utility - Reference for making tRPC queries (useQuery pattern for fetching projects, models, settings)
Better-auth client - Use for session checks in protected routes (models, settings), already configured
App config table schema - Store encrypted API keys here with userId foreign key (openrouterApiKey field)

node.package: Data table (AC50 - install via bun add @tanstack/react-table)
Icon library for sidebar nav icons
Component registry (install via bunx shadcn@latest add)

external.api: Fetch available LLM models with pricing/specs. Requires API key stored in app_config table.

architectural.constraint: Use existing better-auth configuration from packages/auth/ - no new auth setup required
Follow CARBON UX theme: Corner borders (border-radius: 0), monospace typography (Commit Mono), dark mode default
Use shadcn/ui components from registry - install via bunx shadcn@latest add component-name (NOT npm)
Self-host Commit Mono font from apps/web/public/fonts/ (4 WOFF2 files already present) for Tauri desktop app offline support
TanStack Router for routing, TanStack Query for server state, TanStack Table for data tables
Connect to tRPC API endpoints in packages/api/ - no REST endpoints
All shadcn installations use bunx (Bun runtime) not npm
Provider abstraction pattern: Models service implements ModelProvider interface for future multi-provider support (Anthropic, OpenAI) without refactoring core logic

data.constraint: API key encryption using AES-256-GCM before database storage in app_config.openrouterApiKey
Multi-user isolation: userId foreign key on app_config for future multi-tenancy support
Projects filtered by userId when multi-user support enabled (currently all users see all projects)

ui-ux.constraint: Visual design matches UX foundation specification CARBON theme
Sidebar matches shadcn sidebar-08 block design pattern exactly
Empty component matches shadcn Empty component design pattern
Data table follows shadcn data-table pattern with TanStack Table

testing.constraint: 80% line coverage target for components (Empty, Sidebar, DataTable, API Keys Form)
90% line coverage target for API endpoints (projects.list, models.list, settings.*)
Bun test framework for all unit and integration tests

api-endpoint.name: trpc.projects.list
api-endpoint.description: Returns all projects ordered by createdAt DESC. Add userId filter when multi-user support enabled.

api-endpoint.name: trpc.models.list
api-endpoint.description: Fetch models from OpenRouter API when API key configured. Returns empty array if key not configured. Requires authentication.

api-endpoint.name: trpc.settings.getApiKey
api-endpoint.signature: getApiKey: protectedProcedure.query() => Promise<{ key: string (masked), enabled: boolean }>
api-endpoint.description: Returns masked OpenRouter API key (last 4 chars visible) and enabled status from app_config table filtered by userId

api-endpoint.name: trpc.settings.saveApiKey
api-endpoint.signature: saveApiKey: protectedProcedure.input(z.object({ key: string, enabled: boolean })).mutation() => Promise<{ success: boolean }>
api-endpoint.description: Encrypts API key using AES-256-GCM and stores in app_config.openrouterApiKey with userId

api-endpoint.name: trpc.settings.updateApiKey
api-endpoint.signature: updateApiKey: protectedProcedure.input(z.object({ key: string })).mutation() => Promise<{ success: boolean }>
api-endpoint.description: Re-encrypts and updates existing API key in app_config

api-endpoint.name: trpc.settings.removeApiKey
api-endpoint.description: Deletes stored API key from app_config filtered by userId

api-endpoint.name: trpc.settings.testApiKey
api-endpoint.signature: testApiKey: protectedProcedure.input(z.object({ key: string })).mutation() => Promise<{ valid: boolean }>
api-endpoint.description: Validates OpenRouter API key via test request to GET https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/models with Authorization header

component-interface.name: ModelProvider
component-interface.signature: interface ModelProvider { name: string; fetchModels(apiKey: string): Promise<Model[]>; testApiKey(apiKey: string): Promise<boolean>; }
component-interface.description: Provider abstraction pattern for future multi-provider support. OpenRouterProvider implements this interface. Future providers (Anthropic, OpenAI) can be added by implementing interface and registering in provider registry without refactoring core logic.

component-interface.name: Encryption Service
component-interface.signature: encrypt(plaintext: string): string; decrypt(ciphertext: string): string;
component-interface.description: AES-256-GCM encryption/decryption for API keys. Uses ENCRYPTION_KEY environment variable (generate on first launch if missing).

standards.framework: Bun test framework for all unit and integration tests
standards.frontend-testing: Vitest (already configured) + @testing-library/react for component tests. Mock tRPC calls using msw (Mock Service Worker).
standards.backend-testing: Bun test (native runner) for API routers and services. Test database or in-memory SQLite for isolation. Mock external APIs (OpenRouter).
standards.e2e-testing: Playwright or Cypress for critical user journeys (Settings → Models flow, Navigation). Limited scope for MVP.
standards.coverage-targets: 80% line coverage for components (Empty, Sidebar, DataTable, API Keys Form). 90% line coverage for API endpoints (projects.list, models.list, settings.*). 100% for critical user journeys.
standards.test-patterns: Follow existing test pattern from packages/api/src/routers/projects.test.ts for API testing. Component tests follow React Testing Library best practices (user-centric queries, no implementation details).

locations.backend: packages/api/src/**/*.test.ts - API router and service integration tests

test-suite.name: Empty Component
test-suite.test: Renders empty state with correct title and description
Displays FolderCode icon from Tabler Icons or Lucide
Shows "Create Project" button with primary styling
Button click logs to console (placeholder behavior)
Uses shadcn Empty component primitives correctly

test-suite.name: App Sidebar
test-suite.test: Renders all 4 navigation items (Home, Projects, Models, Settings) with correct icons
Highlights active route with data-[active=true] state
Collapses to icon-only mode when trigger clicked
Navigates to correct route on item click
Sidebar state (collapsed/expanded) persists across navigation

test-suite.name: Models Data Table
test-suite.test: Renders table with correct columns (Model Name, Provider, Context Length, Price)
Sorts by column header click (ascending/descending toggle)
Filters by search input (model name fuzzy match)
Filters by provider dropdown (unique providers from API)
Filters by min context dropdown (All, 8k, 32k, 128k, 200k+)
Shows skeleton rows during loading state
Shows empty component on error with retry button
Pagination shows 25 rows per page with Previous/Next buttons

test-suite.name: API Keys Form
test-suite.test: Renders OpenRouter section with enable checkbox, password input, Show toggle, Test/Update/Remove buttons
Password input masks API key by default, Show button toggles visibility
Test button triggers validation mutation and updates status badge
Update button triggers updateApiKey mutation
Remove button triggers removeApiKey mutation
Status badge shows correct state (Valid ✅ / Invalid ❌ / Not Configured ⚪)
Save button disabled when no changes made, triggers saveApiKey mutation when enabled

test-suite.name: Projects Router
test-suite.test: list procedure returns user's projects only (filters by userId when multi-user enabled)
list procedure returns empty array when user has no projects
list procedure requires authentication (throws UNAUTHORIZED if no session)
list procedure orders projects by createdAt DESC

test-suite.name: Models Router
test-suite.test: list procedure returns OpenRouter models when API key configured and enabled
list procedure returns empty array when key not configured
list procedure formats context length correctly (200000 → "200k")
list procedure formats prices correctly ($3/$15 format)
list procedure handles OpenRouter API errors gracefully
list procedure uses provider abstraction pattern (ModelProvider interface)

test-suite.name: Settings Router
test-suite.test: getApiKey returns masked key (shows last 4 chars only) and enabled status
saveApiKey encrypts key before storing in database using AES-256
saveApiKey updates app_config table with userId foreign key
updateApiKey re-encrypts and updates existing key
removeApiKey deletes key from app_config filtered by userId
testApiKey validates OpenRouter key via test request to /api/v1/models
testApiKey returns invalid for incorrect keys (HTTP 401)

test-suite.name: Encryption Service
test-suite.test: encrypt produces different ciphertext each time (IV randomization)
decrypt reverses encryption correctly
decrypt fails gracefully with invalid ciphertext
uses AES-256-GCM algorithm
uses ENCRYPTION_KEY environment variable

test-suite.name: Models Service
test-suite.test: OpenRouterProvider.fetchModels parses API response correctly
OpenRouterProvider.fetchModels handles HTTP 401 (invalid API key)
OpenRouterProvider.fetchModels handles network errors
OpenRouterProvider.testApiKey validates via API test request
formatContextLength handles various token counts (8k, 32k, 128k, 200k, 1M)
formatPrice handles fractional dollars correctly
Provider abstraction allows adding new providers without refactoring core logic

test-suite.name: E2E - Settings to Models Flow
test-suite.test: User can add OpenRouter API key and see models on Models page
User can update existing OpenRouter API key
User can remove OpenRouter API key and models page shows empty state
User sees "Not configured" status before adding key, "Valid" after successful test
Models page loads within 2 seconds with 150 models
Data table filtering/sorting responds within 100ms
API key test completes within 3 seconds

test-suite.name: E2E - Navigation
test-suite.test: Sidebar navigation works across all routes (Home, Projects, Models, Settings)
Active route highlighted correctly on each page
Sidebar collapse/expand persists across navigation
Protected routes (Models, Settings) redirect to /login when not authenticated
Sidebar navigation transitions are smooth (no layout shift or flicker)
